metadata.description: Official Project CodeGuard plugins for secure AI-assisted coding

plugins.name: codeguard-security
plugins.description: Core security rules (22 rules) for AI coding agents - covers credentials, cryptography, input validation, authentication, and more

plugins.name: codeguard-owasp
plugins.description: OWASP Cheat Sheet security rules (86 rules) - comprehensive topic-specific guidance for SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, authentication, and more
